name: Doctor Who: Scream of the Shalka
original_name: Doctor Who: Scream of the Shalka
overview: The Doctor, a time-traveling alien explorer, is sent by his people, the Time Lords, to liberate a small town in England from the tyrannical rule of a race of alien lava creatures called the Shalka.

trailers.title: Doctor Who: Scream of the Shalka DVD Trailer
